nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 罗马
nodes.summary: 罗马是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cirl bunting，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Cirl bunting
nodes.summary: Cirl bunting（Cirl bunting，学名 Emberiza cirlus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于罗马。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The ideal farmland habitat is a mixture of grass and arable fields, divided by thick hedgerows with pockets of dense scrub. They can tolerate a certain degree of urbanisation, and are found in green spaces in towns and cities, even Rome. They are sedentary in nature and will often travel only from their nests to forage in summer, and up to in winter to find stubble
